title: Nursery Rhyme. DC. Local.
content:
The little priest of Felton,
        The little priest of Felton,
        He kill'd a mouse within his house,
        And ne'er a one to help him.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DC. Local.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
